temperature.evidence: Customer: 'Actually aap kaafi questions puch rahe hain. Abhi main occupied hun itna time nahi hai ki main proper na baat kar paun.'

objections.quote: Mere ko at least khud se padhna padega ki kya plan hai.
Abhi main occupied hun itna time nahi hai ki main proper na baat kar paun.

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Agent: 'saal ki jo apni investment jama hogi is plan mein 60000 rupaye jama hogi ma'am.', value: '5K_10K'

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: 'Mujhe plan ka naam bata dijiye main Google kar lungi. Aajkal Google pe har cheez available hoti hai.', value: 'experienced'

decision_maker_status.evidence: Agent: 'zahir si baat hai ma'am decision toh aapka hi rehta hoga ghar mein ya sir ka rehta hai', Customer did not confirm.

agent_promises: life insurance cover up to 100 years

product_fit.mismatch_reason: The agent pushed a high-premium savings plan that does not align well with the customer's stated annual income of 3 lakhs.
missed_opportunities: Did not explore the customer's existing health insurance coverage for potential cross-sell.

approachability.reasoning: Customer was clearly annoyed by the number of questions and explicitly stated she is not free to talk, preferring to research on her own.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent opened with a high-pressure pitch about a 'guaranteed' plan, to which the customer responded with polite but cautious engagement.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was initially passive but became increasingly annoyed and dismissive due to the agent's persistent questioning and aggressive sales pitch.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer pushed back against the agent's persistent questioning and requested to receive details via WhatsApp instead of continuing the call.
call_narrative.ending: The customer abruptly ended the call, stating she was busy and would research the plan herself.

key_quotes: Actually aap kaafi questions puch rahe hain. Abhi main occupied hun itna time nahi hai ki main proper na baat kar paun.
Mere ko at least khud se padhna padega ki kya plan hai.
Mujhe plan ka naam bata dijiye main Google kar lungi.
